headline: Nvidia, Clorox, Nebius Group And A Consumer Cyclical Stock On CNBC’s ‘Final Trades’
summary: Stephen Weiss of Short Hills Capital Partners chose DICK'S Sporting Goods as his final trade on CNBC's Halftime Report. Clorox and NVIDIA were also recommended.
